---
title: "Global Sustainable Energy Trends (2000–2020)"
author:
- Shakshi Shah
- Annamalai Vikash Raam Manoj
- Siyuan Yin
- Xuanning Zhang
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Executive Summary

# Introduction

# Methodology

# Results

# Discussion and Recommendations

# References
